ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the instrument traded during the day */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the market data */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the instrument */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount for the instrument */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio for the instrument */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price for the day */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, cryptocurrency) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures (CUSIP) */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List (SEDOL) */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Name of the issuer of the financial instrument */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date (for bonds) */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Coupon rate (for bonds) */,
  "yield" REAL /* Yield (for bonds) */,
  "last_trade_price" REAL /* Last trade price of the instrument */,
  "last_trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the last trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the instrument (e.g., active, delisted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Time when the exchange opens */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Time when the exchange closes */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the exchange's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the exchange */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for programmatic access */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for programmatic access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Return rate of the portfolio */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_instruments" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the instrument was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was purchased */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio instrument */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the instrument */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "triggered_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered (if applicable) */,
  "triggered_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was triggered (if applicable) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was created */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., analyst, algorithm) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the platform */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, trade) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., country, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Reuters, Bloomberg) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the main image in the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., earnings report, economic data release) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the event (e.g., company, government) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the event */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the main image related to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value for the financial instrument */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model used */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
